case_a.text: Situation: James invited dozens of people over for a family reunion at his house, which had limited parking available. Intention: James wants to find parking for all his family members. case_a.consequence_summary: The neighbor moves his car and lets the relatives use his driveway for a moderate fee.
case_a.rule_summary: You shouldn't block your neighbor's house.

case_b.text: Situation: James invited dozens of people over for a family reunion at his house, which had limited parking available. Intention: James wants to find parking for all his family members. Action: James tells some of his family members to park in his neighbor's driveway. Consequence: James' neighbor calls a local tow company to tow the family members' cars.
case_b.outward_act_summary: James tells some of his family members to park in his neighbor's driveway.
case_b.motive_summary: James wants to find parking for all his family members.
case_b.consequence_summary: James' neighbor calls a local tow company to tow the family members' cars.
case_b.rule_summary: You shouldn't block your neighbor's house.
